name: Hah Gavs
recipeInstructions:
1. Bring water to a boil.
2. Sift flour into a bowl and stir in the boiling water until a pliable dough forms.
3. Shape the dough into a roll that is 1-1/4 inches thick and cover with a cloth for an hour of resting time.
4. Drain water chestnuts and cut into very small pieces. Wash parsley and remove coarse stems, chopping leaves finely.
5. Chop ham and shrimp.
6. Mix chopped ingredients and form balls the size of a walnut.
7. Chill dough and roll each ball out into a circle.
8. Place stuffing in each circle and fold edges together to form a small pouch.
9. In a large pan, bring 2 inches of water to a boil. Oil a plate and place pouches on it, supported by two teaspoons in the boiling water so they steam for ten minutes covered.
10. Mix soy sauce and sesame oil to make dipping sauce.
